emails.body: RE: Legal Essentials for Managers Training August 22, 2001 (Part 2) Miranda, Will it be possible to reschedule my time for this training? I just learned that I will be out of town on Wednesday. Do you have any time next week available? I am sorry for any inconvenience this may cause. Thank you, Kim Watson. X33098

emails.body: RE: Legal Essentials for Managers Training August 22, 2001 (Part 2) I would like to attend the 10/31 session. Will the training be in the morning? Thanks, Kim.

emails.body: RE: Legal Essentials for Managers Training August 22, 2001 (Part 2) I'm sorry to keep changing my mind, but I would now like to attend the 10/17 class. Fran informed me of another Leadership training class that is on 10/31-11/02 that I would like to be able to attend. Many thanks for your patience. Kim.

emails.body: RE: Legal Essentials for Managers Training August 22, 2001 (Part 2) Kim, No problem. You are now confirmed for 10/17 8 am 12 pm. I do not have the location yet but I will send you that information later. Thanks, Miranda
